title: Dungeons End Music
description: Supplements the End with music by Peter Hont and Rostislav Trifonov
body:
Adds new ambient tracks to the End dimension, borrowed from the Minecraft Dungeons: Echoing Void DLC.


<details>
<summary>Songs Included</summary>

- Peter Hont - Astray Archipelago
- Peter Hont - City
- Peter Hont - End Wilds
- Rostislav Trifonov - Ethereal Blocks
- Peter Hont - Obsidian Cavern
- Peter Hont - Ship

</details>

This only modifies the music of the outer End islands, and does not affect the dragon fight.

Music toast added in 1.21.6 also supported.

Tested in 1.21.8 and 1.9.0, but should work with other versions as well.

Reccomended with packs like [Nullscape](https://modrinth.com/datapack/nullscape) or [AL's Enderman Revamped](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/als-enderman-revamped).
